settings.heading: Thank you for celebrating New Year's Eve with Luxury London Events!
Celebrate New Year’s Eve at The Londoner Hotel

settings.text:
Welcome to an enchanting New Year's Eve at The Londoner Hotel, hosted by Luxury London Events. Situated in the heart of London's vibrant Leicester Square, this premier venue will be the backdrop for our exquisite Masquerade Ball

Launch of a Prestigious Event

We are thrilled to launch the first edition (previously held at The Dorchester, Park Lane Hilton and The Sheraton) of our legendary New Year's Eve event at The 5 Star Londoner Hotel. This grand celebration promises to be an unforgettable experience, combining elegance, excitement, and glamour in one of London’s most iconic locations set over 3 floors for 700 guests.

Immerse Yourself in Elegance

Bid farewell to 2024 and welcome 2025 in style at our grand event. Enjoy an evening of live music, captivating entertainment, and a sophisticated atmosphere. The night begins with a Moet Champagne and canapé reception, setting the stage for the festivities with entertainment, exhilarating performances and music throughout the night. 

Delectable Dining and Exclusive Drinks

Experience a lavish banquet curated by The Londoner's renowned culinary team. During dinner service, guests can enjoy free-flowing red and white house wine, concluding once dessert has been served. For an elevated experience, upgrade to our Platinum Dinner and Party package, which includes table service and premium seating near the dance floor. Platinum dinner guests also have access to an open bar with premium spirits, fine wines, beers, and soft drinks during dinner service for 2 hours.

Ticket Options:

Gold Package - Tickets starting from £395:

  • Four hot and cold canapés on arrival
  • Two glasses of Moet & Chandon Champagne
  • Three-course seasonal menu
  • Free-flowing red and white house wine during dinner service (concluding once the dessert has been served)
  • Unlimited still and sparkling water throughout the evening
  • Two passed midnight snacks

Platinum Package (Includes Gold) - Tickets Starting from £525:

  • Premium seating closest to the dance floor
  • Free-flowing spirits, beers, and soft drinks during dinner (2 Hours)
  • Dedicated waiter table service all night

After Party (Access from 21:30) - Tickets starting from £175:

  • Two passed midnight snacks
  • Unlimited still and sparkling water
  • Access to the ballroom (after dinner service) and free-flow access to the Green Room (Nightclub Room) and the Gallery
  • VIP Party Table upgrade options available in the Green Room

Event Highlights

  • Doors Open: 19:00, Carriages 02:30
  • Location: The Londoner Hotel, Leicester Square, London, WC2H 7DX
  • Capacity: Over 700 guests across three stunning floors – The Green Room, The Ballroom, and The Gallery
  • Entertainment: Live performances, entertainment, and DJ sets
  • Accomodation Hotel Rooms available on request

Secure Your Spot

Don’t miss out on one of London’s most coveted New Year’s Eve Masquerade Gala Dinners and After Parties. Join us to toast to new beginnings and the dawn of 2024 in unforgettable style at The exclusive 5 Star Londoner Hotel.
